creator: mew14930xvi@inbox.lv
text:
With xim, the gtk3 app hangs, but if you use uim and export GTK_IM_MODULE=xim, you should be able to input japanese.
https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/xorg/lib/libx11/-/commit/62c3337d89d31e0d3ed807004e73ad711fad3342
If you revert this this patch and build libX11, you may be able to input with kinput2.
